requirement_topic.en: Networked Charging, OCPP and IEC 61000 EMC

summary.en: No Eritrea national OCPP or EVSE EMC rule was confirmed. For any networked charger, OCPP should be specified as the practical open back-office protocol so the operator can monitor status, faults, energy use, user access, and load management. EMC and power-quality evidence should be prepared under the IEC 61000 series, including emissions, immunity, harmonics, and flicker where relevant. In Eritrea's weak-grid context, network resilience, cellular or wired backhaul, offline behaviour, and surge protection are project-critical.
summary.zh: 未能确认厄立特里亚存在国家层面的OCPP或EVSE EMC规则。对于任何联网充电桩，应将OCPP指定为实用的开放后台协议，以便运营方监控状态、故障、用电量、用户访问和负载管理。EMC和电能质量证据应按IEC 61000系列准备，包括相关的发射、抗扰度、谐波和闪变。在厄立特里亚弱电网环境下，网络韧性、蜂窝或有线回传、离线行为和浪涌保护是项目关键事项。
summary.zht: 未能確認厄利垂亞存在國家層面的OCPP或EVSE EMC規則。對於任何聯網充電樁，應將OCPP指定為實用的開放後台協議，以便運營方監控狀態、故障、用電量、用戶訪問和負載管理。EMC和電能質量證據應按IEC 61000系列準備，包括相關的發射、抗擾度、諧波和閃變。在厄利垂亞弱電網環境下，網絡韌性、蜂窩或有線回傳、離線行為和浪湧保護是項目關鍵事項。

standards_or_laws: OCPP — Open Charge Point Protocol for charger-to-back-office communication
IEC 61000 series — EMC, harmonics, flicker, immunity and emissions
IEC 61851-24 / ISO 15118 — DC charging communication where CCS2 functionality is required

summary.en: China DC chargers commonly use GB/T 27930-2023 communication between the off-board charger and vehicle battery management system. That CAN-based DC protocol is not a back-office protocol and does not provide OCPP interoperability. China-market chargers may also use operator-specific network protocols or domestic EMC evidence that may not map to IEC 61000 project expectations without a clause-level review.
summary.zh: 中国直流充电桩通常采用GB/T 27930-2023作为非车载充电机与车辆电池管理系统之间的通信协议。该CAN总线直流协议不是后台协议，也不能提供OCPP互操作。中国市场充电桩还可能采用运营商专用网络协议或国内EMC证据，若未进行逐条审查，可能无法映射至IEC 61000项目预期。
summary.zht: 中國直流充電樁通常採用GB/T 27930-2023作為非車載充電機與車輛電池管理系統之間的通訊協議。該CAN總線直流協議不是後台協議，也不能提供OCPP互操作。中國市場充電樁還可能採用運營商專用網絡協議或國內EMC證據，若未進行逐條審查，可能無法映射至IEC 61000項目預期。

standards_or_laws: China domestic EMC evidence where applicable

gap.en: Confirm the required OCPP version and server integration, test offline charging and reconnection behaviour, document remote monitoring and load-management functions, replace GB/T 27930 vehicle-side DC assumptions with CCS2 communication where required, and prepare IEC 61000 EMC / power-quality evidence for 230/400 V, 50 Hz operation. A GB/T 27930-only DC charger with no OCPP back office is not ready for a managed Eritrea charging project.
gap.zh: 应确认所需OCPP版本和服务器集成，测试离线充电及重新连接行为，记录远程监控和负载管理功能，在需要时将GB/T 27930车辆侧直流假设替换为CCS2通信，并准备适用于230/400 V、50 Hz运行的IEC 61000 EMC / 电能质量证据。仅支持GB/T 27930且无OCPP后台的直流充电桩不适用于受管理的厄立特里亚充电项目。
gap.zht: 應確認所需OCPP版本和伺服器集成，測試離線充電及重新連接行為，記錄遠程監控和負載管理功能，在需要時將GB/T 27930車輛側直流假設替換為CCS2通訊，並準備適用於230/400 V、50 Hz運行的IEC 61000 EMC / 電能質量證據。僅支持GB/T 27930且無OCPP後台的直流充電樁不適用於受管理的厄利垂亞充電項目。

mandatory_status.target: Project-specific — OCPP and IEC 61000 evidence should be specified for networked or utility-managed chargers; no confirmed Eritrea national OCPP mandate identified
mandatory_status.cn: GB/T 27930 is China domestic DC vehicle-side communication and is not an OCPP or IEC 61000 substitute

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Specify OCPP for managed chargers and IEC 61000 EMC evidence for the 230/400 V, 50 Hz site. GB/T 27930 is not a back-office protocol and does not solve OCPP interoperability, CCS2 communication, or EMC acceptance.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 受管理充电桩应指定OCPP，并针对230/400 V、50 Hz现场准备IEC 61000 EMC证据。GB/T 27930不是后台协议，不能解决OCPP互操作、CCS2通信或EMC认可。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 受管理充電樁應指定OCPP，並針對230/400 V、50 Hz現場準備IEC 61000 EMC證據。GB/T 27930不是後台協議，不能解決OCPP互操作、CCS2通訊或EMC認可。
